subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur spun an elaborate tale about the armor's origin, carefully avoiding any mention of their true magical creation.
source_quote: He claimed the sets came from bandit camps and a raided castle, carefully avoiding any mention of their true magical creation.

subject: Daein
fact: Daein seized the opportunity to weave Maram il Vass's suggestion into their story with such conviction that the Yugoloth was completely convinced.
source_quote: Daein seized the opportunity and wove the suggestion into their story with such conviction that the Yugoloth was completely convinced.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's enhanced sight revealed the Yugoloth's true form as a seven-foot-tall demon with jaws and claws.
source_quote: revealed as a seven-foot-tall demon with jaws and claws to Bramgrim's enhanced sight

subject: Daein
fact: Daein recognized the Chasme Demons as intelligent taskmasters from the Abyss designed to punish deserters from the Blood War.
source_quote: Daein recognized them as intelligent taskmasters from the Abyss, creatures designed to punish deserters from the Blood War

subject: Daein
fact: Daein warned the party to plug their ears against the necrotic droning sound produced by the Chasme Demons.
source_quote: warned the party to plug their ears against the necrotic droning sound they produced

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon radiant energy to strike at the demons.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon radiant energy to strike at the demons

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur hurled bolts of flame at the creatures, though their demonic nature allowed them to shrug off much of the fire's damage.
source_quote: Felkur hurled bolts of flame at the creatures, though their demonic nature allowed them to shrug off much of the fire's damage

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marked one of the demons with her hunter's focus before loosing arrows at it.
source_quote: Akritas marked one of the demons with her hunter's focus before loosing arrows at it

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim directed his spectral weapon to strike at the chain holding one of the cages.
source_quote: He directed his spectral weapon to strike at the chain holding one of the cages

subject: Daein
fact: Daein charged forward with his longsword, striking one of the demons repeatedly and calling upon his reserves of strength for additional attacks.
source_quote: Daein charged forward with his longsword, striking one of the demons repeatedly and calling upon his reserves of strength for additional attacks

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas repositioned herself and continued her barrage of arrows, dealing devastating damage to the creatures.
source_quote: Akritas repositioned herself and continued her barrage of arrows, dealing devastating damage to the creatures

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim took a vicious critical strike from the demon's proboscis that dealt massive damage to both his body and his life force.
source_quote: taking a vicious critical strike from the demon's proboscis that dealt massive damage to both his body and his life force

subject: The Party
fact: The party made the tactical decision to retreat rather than continue the fight.
source_quote: The party made the tactical decision to retreat rather than continue the fight

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass observed their injuries with mild interest and inquired about the fate of his demon guards.
source_quote: Maram il Vass observed their injuries with mild interest and inquired about the fate of his demon guards

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass seemed unconcerned that one of his demon guards had been killed, noting that the hags could handle the situation.
source_quote: he seemed unconcerned, noting that the hags could handle the situation

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass's demeanor shifted to one of calculated interest when his attention turned to Felkur.
source_quote: his demeanor shifted to one of calculated interest

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass revealed that he had been searching for Felkur for some time, connected to an item the artificer had allegedly stolen.
source_quote: He revealed that he had been searching for Felkur for some time, connected to an item the artificer had allegedly stolen

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur demanded to know the location and defenses of the item he would need to retrieve.
source_quote: He demanded to know the location and defenses of the item he would need to retrieve

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass was impressed by Felkur's boldness and agreed to include the requested information.
source_quote: Maram il Vass, impressed by the artificer's boldness, agreed to include this information

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur crafted a no-betrayal clause to ensure that if Maram il Vass switched sides or revealed his location, the Yugoloth would suffer a cosmic curse or forfeit his true name.
source_quote: Felkur then crafted a no-betrayal clause, ensuring that if Maram il Vass switched sides or revealed his location anyway, the Yugoloth would suffer a cosmic curse or forfeit his true name

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur suggested sealing the deal with a magical binding ritual, demonstrating such knowledge of binding law that even Maram il Vass expressed genuine admiration.
source_quote: Felkur suggested sealing the deal with a magical binding ritual, demonstrating such knowledge of binding law that even Maram il Vass expressed genuine admiration

subject: Felkur
fact: The contract granted Felkur additional protection against fear while under its terms.
source_quote: granting Felkur additional protection against fear while under its terms

subject: The Hags
fact: The hags arrived to take over guard duty, muttering complaints about the quality of hired help.
source_quote: muttering complaints about the quality of hired help

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass would need new guardians for his prisoners, according to the taunting Chasme Demon.
source_quote: commenting that Maram il Vass would need new guardians for his prisoners

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass observes the party's injuries.
source_quote: Maram il Vass observes the party's injuries

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass inquires about the encounter with the demons.
source_quote: inquires about the encounter with the demons

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass reveals his long-standing interest in Felkur, stemming from a stolen item.
source_quote: Maram il Vass reveals his long-standing interest in Felkur, stemming from a stolen item

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur questions what will happen if he refuses the deal.
source_quote: Felkur questions what will happen if he refuses

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur engages in a complex negotiation to secure favorable terms for the contract.
source_quote: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass to secure favorable terms for the contract

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur successfully adds a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve.
source_quote: Felkur successfully adds a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur secures a 'no-betrayal' clause, making the contract airtight against Maram il Vass switching sides or suffering a cosmic curse.
source_quote: Felkur secures a 'no-betrayal' clause, making the contract airtight against Maram il Vass switching sides or suffering a cosmic curse

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal, impressing Maram il Vass with his knowledge of binding law.
source_quote: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal, impressing Maram il Vass with his knowledge of binding law

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass expresses his admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills.
source_quote: Maram il Vass expresses his admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills

subject: Daein
fact: Daein recognizes the Chasma Demons' properties, including magic resistance, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, advantage on saving throws against magic, immunity to poison, and their droning sound causing necrotic damage.
source_quote: Daein recognizes the Chasma Demons' properties, including magic resistance, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, advantage on saving throws against magic, immunity to poison, and their droning sound causing necrotic damage

subject: Daein
fact: Daein prepares an attack and shouts for the drow prisoner.
source_quote: Daein prepares an attack and shouts for the drow prisoner

subject: The Chasma Demon
fact: The Chasma Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim, saying 'So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside. I will find the crack in your shell, little stone man.'
source_quote: The remaining Chasma Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim, saying 'So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside. I will find the crack in your shell, little stone man.'

subject: The Chasma Demon
fact: The Chasma Demon telepathically taunts Akritas, saying 'I have played the minds of demons who define terror. You are merely a snack, and I will snack on you.'
source_quote: The other Chasma Demon telepathically taunts Akritas, saying 'I have played the minds of demons who define terror. You are merely a snack, and I will snack on you.'

subject: The party
fact: The party fabricated the origin of the armor sets, claiming they came from bandit camps and a raided castle, to increase their perceived value to Maram il Vass.
source_quote: The party fabricated their origin, claiming they came from bandit camps and a raided castle, to increase their perceived value to Maram il Vass

subject: The Hags
fact: The hags arrived in the Hanging Gardens to take over guarding the prisoners after the party's escape, muttering about the difficulty of finding good hired help.
source_quote: muttering about the difficulty of finding good hired help
